title: EOIR reportedly plans to halt LOP
description_html:
The Vera Institute, which is EOIR's contractor for the Legal Orientation Program (LOP), reports that EOIR is planning to halt the program. The LOP is a program of EOIR's Office of Legal Access Programs.

[ID #317]
description_text:
The Vera Institute, which is EOIR's contractor for the Legal Orientation Program (LOP), reports that EOIR is planning to halt the program. The LOP is a program of EOIR's Office of Legal Access Programs.

[ID #317]
search_document: Vera which contractor EOIR reportedly plans to halt LOP Vera Institute Press Release: Statement on DOJ’s Decision to Halt Legal Orientation Program On April 25, 2018, the DOJ reverses its position, announcing that it will continue LOP while the department continues a review, rather than halt it altogether. The Legal Orientation Program, established in 2003, partners with non-profit organizations to provide individual and group presentations, workshops, and pro bono referral services to detained immigrants in removal proceedings immigration court Opening Statement of Attorney General Jeff Sessions Before the Senate Appropriations Subcommittee on Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies.
